'''Sullustan regiments''' were primarily used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] as [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] units.

==Overview==
Sullustan regiments were fairly cheap to establish and maintain, but consequently also poorly equipped for offensive purposes. However, the groups were fairly skilled when it came to defensive duties and especially trained in foiling covert enemy operations.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]
